# OpenHub — AI tools in one macOS window
> A free, open-source macOS app. Chat with any model, run a code agent, design interfaces, manage projects, and orchestrate a team of AI agents. Your API keys stay on your Mac.

## Docs
- [Usage guide](https://github.com/Open-Fable/OpenHub/blob/main/docs/USAGE.md)
- [Orchestrator reference](https://github.com/Open-Fable/OpenHub/blob/main/docs/ORCHESTRATOR.md)
- [Architecture](https://github.com/Open-Fable/OpenHub/blob/main/ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [Security policy](https://github.com/Open-Fable/OpenHub/blob/main/docs/SECURITY.md)

## Pages
- [Home](https://open-fable.github.io/OpenHub/landing/index.html): Five AI tools in one macOS window — Chat, Orchestrator, Code, Design, Work, Memory
- [Tools](https://open-fable.github.io/OpenHub/landing/tools.html): Detailed walkthrough of every tool
- [How it works](https://open-fable.github.io/OpenHub/landing/how-it-works.html): Local proxy, single config, override layer architecture
- [Privacy & security](https://open-fable.github.io/OpenHub/landing/privacy.html): Keys in Keychain, localhost proxy, no cloud
- [FAQ](https://open-fable.github.io/OpenHub/landing/faq.html): Costs, platforms, data location, troubleshooting
- [Get started](https://open-fable.github.io/OpenHub/landing/get-started.html): Download, install, add keys in 2 minutes
